name: hebbrix
description: Persistent long-term memory + temporal knowledge graph for Claude Code. Auto-loads your compiled profile into every session and gives Claude tools to remember, search, and reason over what matters.

api_key.title: Hebbrix API key
api_key.description: Optional. Leave blank to run in free agent mode (an account is minted automatically, no email needed). Get a key at hebbrix.com/dashboard/api-keys.

collection_id.title: Default collection
collection_id.description: Optional. Default memory space for writes/reads. Agent mode sets one automatically.
